caption: Did you know? 🤯 After 40, women's bodies go through significant changes that can lead to weight gain. 💔 Here are the facts: 📊 1) Hormonal shifts: Decreased estrogen affects metabolism. 📈 2) Muscle mass loss: Less muscle means slower metabolism. 🏋️‍♀️ 3) Stress and cortisol: Increased stress leads to belly fat. 😬 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏💖 #womenover40 #weightgain #hormones #metabolism #healthyliving
